name: Cloudflare
description: Monitor Cloudflare security settings including TLS/SSL configuration and WAF firewall rules for compliance evidence

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Cloudflare Dashboard at https://dash.cloudflare.com.
2. Go to My Profile > API Tokens > Create Token.
3. Create a custom token with the following Zone permissions:
   - Zone > Zone Settings > Read
   - Zone > Zone > Read
   - Zone > WAF > Read
4. Set Zone Resources to 'All zones' (or select specific zones you want to monitor).
5. Copy the token and enter it below.
6. Copy the Zone ID(s) from each domain's overview page (right sidebar). You can enter multiple Zone IDs separated by commas.

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Cloudflare Dashboard > My Profile > API Tokens. Create a custom token with Zone Settings:Read, Zone:Read, and Zone WAF:Read permissions for all zones you want to monitor.

checks.name: TLS / HTTPS
checks.description: Verifies that Cloudflare SSL/TLS encryption mode is set to Full or Strict for end-to-end encryption across all monitored zones

checks.name: Production Firewall
checks.description: Verifies that Cloudflare WAF firewall rules are configured and active across all monitored zones

checks.name: Encryption at Rest
checks.description: Verifies Cloudflare data stores encryption at rest across all monitored zones - all Cloudflare storage is encrypted at rest by default using AES-256

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Cloudflare zones are active with DDoS protection and performance features enabled
